answer: Vonage does not offer a permanent free tier for its APIs. Instead, new users receive free trial credit upon signing up, which allows for testing and development without an initial payment or credit card requirement [1][2][3][4]. Once this trial credit is exhausted or the trial period ends, you must transition to a paid plan [2]. You can manage your account balance, monitor usage, and view your specific pricing through the self-serve Developer Dashboard [1][5]. Standard pricing information for specific products is available via the Pricing API or by downloading a pricing sheet from your dashboard [6][5][4].
